title: Mother 3 - Monkey's Delivery Service on Super Mario Paint
description:
Happy New Year!

I wanted to make a video using RehdBlob's Super Mario Paint software. Try it yourself here: https://github.com/DC37/Super-Mario-Paint/releases

I used the Unfungames original soundfont for this video instead of the Mario Paint Mochi soundfont, only because I couldn't get the Mochi one to work on my version of the software. It will be or has been updated to work though if I use this again. I'll admit I was a little rushed for this video because I wanted to get it out before the New Year, but I still think it came out okay.

I think it's weird that my favorite song in Mother 3's soundtrack was this: a song that only plays once during a short, non-climactic scene. I think it's because I got a nice Professor Layton vibe from it.

Enjoy!
